metadata.name: Record the Disposal of a Fixed Asset

description: The company has sold an old piece of equipment and the accountant needs to remove it from the books.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the asset's record from the fixed asset register, noting its original cost and accumulated depreciation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the asset had a cost of $20,000 and accumulated depreciation of $18,000.

nodes.task_description: Record the cash received from the sale of the asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notes the company received $3,000 from the sale.

nodes.task_description: Calculate and record the gain or loss on the disposal of the asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates a gain on disposal of $1,000 ($3,000 cash - ($20,000 cost - $18,000 accum. dep.)).

nodes.task_description: Create and post the journal entry to remove the asset and its accumulated depreciation from the books and record the gain/loss.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the correct multi-leg journal entry.
